Skill Path: Dread

You intimidate foes through psychological pressure.

While developing your skills in Intimidation you chose to focus specifically on Dread, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.gUqvezs2zzoTXFAI]{Group Coercion}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.CwGMDf0akn0VbNPb]{Vicious Critique}.

This path focuses on Psychological Pressure.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.gUqvezs2zzoTXFAI]{Group Coercion}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.CwGMDf0akn0VbNPb]{Vicious Critique}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.iDimfGmQHacwxeh2]{Terrifying Resistance}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.6vnbC90UQ3I57RrQ]{Lasting Coercion}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.dc8X2Mbtwq6kGp7F]{Terrified Retreat}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.mZttsiWl1ql5NvrH]{Scare to Death}
